scope: AKIDA × SIM-우주 (sim_bridge 10 sub-tools) physical/mathematical limit saturation — anima-side mirror of nexus T1-N{1..6} primary witness

anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.condition: any of 6 tier_1 mirror has only 1 or 2 axes (formal/physical/computational) substantiated post-Akida-arrival
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.verdict_check: all 6 anima mirror tier_1 must show formal+physical+computational simultaneous (raw 72)
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.experiment: audit grep tri_axis_satisfied=true 6/6 across anima docs/n_substrate_n8_*

anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.condition: any of 10 D+0 deployment hooks H1-H10 cannot route sim_bridge subtool output -> AKD1000 input within 7 days post-arrival
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.verdict_check: 10/10 hooks PASS smoke test; partial PASS = warn; <8/10 = FAIL
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.experiment: fire each H1-H10 with synthetic 1s sim_bridge stream + AKD1000.forward roundtrip

anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.condition: any of 10 sim_bridge sub-tools fails selftest at D+0
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.experiment: per-subtool runner.sh selftest sweep at D+0

anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.condition: anima bostrom_test discriminator detects substrate signature in AKD1000 sim-statistics (classifier_acc > chance + 2sigma)
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.experiment: 100 bostrom probe trials on AKD1000 vs RunPod GPU baseline, anima EEG corpora as input

anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.condition: any anima-side metric falsely promoted from theoretical to measured between r2 (2026-04-29) and Akida arrival
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.verdict_check: audit grep null/preregistered/in-context markers in all anima docs/n_substrate_n8_* + state/n_substrate_n8_prep_2026_05_01/*.json
anima_side_falsifiers_inherited_from_pri.experiment: raw 91 honest C3 audit pre + post Akida arrival

anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.condition: actual D+0 hook implementation exceeds 1.5x estimated LoC for any of H1-H10
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.experiment: wc -l on each tool/anima_n8_h{1..10}_*.hexa post D+7 implementation
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.rationale: estimates are extrapolated from sibling n2 spec (1750 word doc, ~50-180 LoC tool); 1.5x cap catches scope creep

anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.condition: n8 D+0 implementation edits or commits weave/cage_assembly_simulation.py or weave/polyhedral_cage_bayesian_audit.py
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.verdict_check: git log --diff-filter=AMD -- nexus/sim_bridge/weave/*.py shows 0 anima-agent commits
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.experiment: audit log per anima/.git after D+7
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.rationale: memory feedback: HEXA-FIRST, no .py in anima repo; weave .py is wrap-only target

anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.condition: anu_stream and/or ouroboros_qrng and/or anu_time daemon NOT running at D+0
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.verdict_check: ps + systemctl + cron status PASS for all 3 entropy daemons
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.experiment: D+0 morning: pgrep stream_daemon.hexa + crontab -l grep anu
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.rationale: roadmap §10.4 explicitly notes cron status uncertain

anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.condition: AKD1000 batch dim limit < K = number of multiverse parallel branches required by H6
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.verdict_check: batch_dim_supported >= K_branches (K = 16 default per multiverse mini_world.hexa convention)
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.experiment: vendor doc lookup at D+0 + akida.Model.forward(batch=K) smoke
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.rationale: multiverse interferometer.hexa K-branch parallelism not vendor-confirmed

anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.condition: primary witness 2026-04-29 falsifier verdicts NOT re-audited at Akida arrival

anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.experiment: compare new D+0 kick witness vs primary witness; emit delta report
anima_side_falsifiers_n8_specific_additi.deadline: D+0 (mandatory refresh per c3_witness_validity_assessment in spec_manifest)
